scripts.install-all: concurrently "cd backend && npm install" "cd gateway && npm install" "cd client && npm install" "cd workers && npm install"
scripts.start: concurrently -n "BACKEND,GATEWAY,ML,WORKER,CLIENT" -c "blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan" "cd backend && npm start" "cd gateway && npm start" "cd ml-service && ..\.venv_new\Scripts\python app.py" "cd workers && node encryptionWorker.js" "cd client && npm run dev"
